Netid State    Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port    Peer Address:Port
tcp   CLOSING  0      0      192.168.1.50:45230   192.168.1.100:80
	 cubic wscale:7,8 rto:204 rtt:1.100/0.550 mss:1460 cwnd:5 ssthresh:100 send 36.4Mbps unacked:0 retrans:0/0

	 cubic wscale:7,8 rto:204 rtt:1.234/0.617 mss:1460 cwnd:10 ssthresh:2147483647 send 84.7Mbps unacked:0 retrans:0/0
